item.title: sherlock-project /sherlock
item.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

item.title: microsoft /agent-framework
item.description: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

item.title: block /goose
item.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

item.title: siddharthvaddem /openscreen
item.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

item.title: Yeachan-Heo /oh-my-codex
item.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

item.title: onyx-dot-app /onyx
item.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

item.title: Blaizzy /mlx-vlm
item.description: MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.
